name: Noor Esfahan Classic

seo.title: Noor Esfahan Classic Rug | Persian Rugs Boston
seo.description: Exquisite 8x10 Esfahan Classic Persian rug hand-knotted in Ghazni wool and pure silk. Available at Noor Oriental Rugs in Cambridge, MA.

description: The Noor Esfahan Classic embodies the pinnacle of traditional Persian weaving artistry. Woven in Esfahan with handspun Ghazni wool and pure silk accents, it features an intricate central medallion surrounded by lush, scrolling floral palmettes against a vibrant ruby red field and a deep navy border. Ideal for historic townhouses, formal dining rooms, and executive libraries.

name: Kashan Royal Medallion

seo.title: Kashan Royal Medallion 9x12 Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Magnificent 9x12 Kashan Royal Medallion semi-antique Persian rug made from fine Kurk wool. Certified appraisal included.

description: A breathtaking representation of classical Kashan craftsmanship, featuring a perfectly proportioned ogival medallion on a rich crimson ground. The intricate spandrels and multiple framing guard borders reveal decades of master weaving experience. Hand-washed and preserved to museum-quality standards.

name: Tabriz Mahi Garden

seo.title: Tabriz Mahi Garden 10x14 Rug | Fine Persian Rugs Boston
seo.description: Luxurious 10x14 Tabriz Mahi Persian rug with silk highlights. High knot density masterpiece available in Greater Boston.

description: Known for its legendary 'Mahi' (fish) design, this fine Tabriz rug offers an incredibly dense, mesmerizing all-over pattern that appears to shimmer under interior lighting due to generous silk outlining. A prestigious foundation piece for expansive living spaces and grand drawing rooms.

name: Nain Habibian Reserve

seo.title: Nain Habibian Reserve 6x9 Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Exquisite 6x9 Nain Habibian style Persian rug with crisp blue and ivory tones, hand-knotted at 400 KPSI.

description: Characterized by its quintessential crisp ivory background and deep navy blue arabesques, this Nain piece utilizes ultra-fine Kurk wool with white silk outlining around every major floral leaf. A brilliant, light-enhancing centerpiece for elegant sitting rooms.

name: Heriz Serapi Grandeur

seo.title: Heriz Serapi Grandeur 8x11 Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Authentic Heriz Serapi 8x11 semi-antique Persian rug with powerful geometric medallion and natural madder dyes.

description: An exceptional geometric Serapi-design Heriz boasting bold, architectural lines and striking natural madder red and indigo blue tones. Extremely durable highland wool makes this a perfect heirloom piece for high-traffic entryways and active family libraries.

name: Seaport Abstract Slate

seo.title: Seaport Abstract Slate Rug | Modern Rugs Boston
seo.description: Modern 8x10 abstract luxury rug hand-knotted in Nepal with Tibetan wool and bamboo silk. Perfect for modern lofts.

description: The Seaport Abstract Slate reflects the dynamic atmosphere of Boston's waterfront design district. Featuring a captivating high-low pile texture carved from fine Tibetan wool and shimmering bamboo silk, its painterly blend of cool slate, charcoal, and ivory tones elevates open-concept lofts and contemporary architecture.

name: Luna Monochrome Minimalist

seo.title: Luna Monochrome Minimalist 9x12 Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Sleek 9x12 minimalist contemporary rug featuring a subtle monochrome gradient. Custom woven for luxury modern homes.

description: A study in refined minimalism, the Luna Monochrome offers a seamless, sophisticated gradient transition from soft pearl mist to deep charcoal. The incredibly soft handspun wool provides superior comfort while maintaining an ultra-clean, tailored visual profile.

name: Strata Linear Gold
material: Tibetan Highland Wool & Pure Mulberry Silk

seo.title: Strata Linear Gold 10x14 Modern Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Striking 10x14 contemporary rug with veins of pure gold mulberry silk running through an ivory wool foundation.

description: Inspired by organic geological striations, the Strata Linear Gold weaves bold, luminous veins of pure mulberry silk through a plush, matte ivory wool landscape. This interplay of light reflection creates an engaging, ever-changing aesthetic across the room.

name: Eclipse Circular Taupe

seo.title: Eclipse Circular Taupe 8x8 Round Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Spectacular 8x8 round modern rug with abstract celestial motifs. Beautiful taupe and cream palette.

description: An exceptional circular format designed to break up linear room geometry. The Eclipse features a gorgeous, fluid interplay of taupe, sand, and cream hues, making it the ultimate anchor piece for grand entry foyers or beneath round architectural dining tables.

name: Zen Transitional Sky

seo.title: Zen Transitional Sky 8x10 Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Exquisite 8x10 transitional rug bridging traditional erased motifs with modern sky blue and soft grey colorways.

description: Flawlessly bridging the gap between classical heritage and modern aesthetics, the Zen Transitional Sky deconstructs traditional Persian floral patterns into an ethereal, erased visual display. Rendered in soothing sky blue, dove grey, and crisp white.

name: Vintage Turkish Chanakaleh Rug

images.alt: Hand Knotted Turkish Rug - Chanakaleh Vintage Wool Rug Full Layout
Vintage Turkish Rug - Chanakaleh Geometric Tribal Motif Angled View
Chanakaleh Rug - Close-up of Center Geometric Medallion and Hand-Knotted Weft
Turkish Wool Rug - Detailed Fringe Reconstruction and Flat Border Finish
Handmade Wool Rug - Pile Thickness and Side Edge Knot Construction Profile

seo.title: Vintage Turkish Chanakaleh Wool Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Discover this rare, one-of-a-kind 2'10" x 4'1" hand-knotted vintage Turkish Chanakaleh wool rug, professionally restored and hand-washed with green shampoo.

description:
This one-of-a-kind vintage Turkish Chanakaleh rug is an exquisite testament to traditional Anatolian hand-knotted craftsmanship. Woven entirely by hand less than 50 years ago, this piece showcases the distinctive geometric tribal design language native to the Chanakaleh region of Turkey. The rug's composition features a bold central mihrab-style architectural field in a rich, antique crimson red, populated by repeating diamond-shaped geometric medallions and stylized zoomorphic motifs outlined in deep navy blue. Intricate cream and soft golden ochre border bands enclose the central pattern, featuring clean zig-zag profiles and hand-woven geometric floral shapes that frame the entire field with striking symmetry.

Constructed using a 100% natural wool warp and weft foundation topped with a low-profile, dense wool pile, this vintage area rug offers exceptional durability and an authentic, rustic underfoot texture. The pigments are colorfast, showcasing beautiful organic dye variations that have softened gracefully over time, giving the rug a distinguished patina and character. To ensure the highest standards of hygiene and structural integrity, this piece has been professionally hand-washed with organic green shampoo and meticulously restored, preserving its fringes and side bindings for decades of continued enjoyment.

With its compact dimensions of 2'10" × 4'1", this versatile accent rug is perfectly suited to bring warmth, history, and character to sophisticated interior spaces. It makes a statement foundation piece in a private library, executive home office, entry foyer, reading room, study, or bedside landing. As an authentic piece of Turkish weaving heritage, this one-of-a-kind rug effortlessly bridges the gap between historical lineage and modern luxury home aesthetics. Every knot tells a story of the artisan's touch, making it a unique collector's piece for those who appreciate the enduring beauty of traditional handmade wool rugs.

name: Sultanabad Majestique

seo.title: Sultanabad Majestique 10x14 Vintage Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Majestic 10x14 Sultanabad semi-antique Persian rug with magnificent oversized palmettes and genuine antique patina.

description: An exquisite Sultanabad presentation celebrated for its highly desirable, oversized floral palmettes and wide, sweeping borders. The antique patina softens the majestic terracotta and soft denim-blue palette into a profoundly inviting foundation for high-end living spaces.

name: Kerman Lavar Botanica

seo.title: Kerman Lavar Botanica 8x11 Antique Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Priceless 8x11 Kerman Lavar antique Persian rug featuring intricate botanical sprays and legendary cochineal rose hues.

description: Representing the legendary weaving workshops of Lavar Kerman, this magnificent antique piece offers a dense tapestry of lifelike botanical sprays, cypress trees, and Millefleurs patterns. It possesses the iconic cochineal rose and deep royal blue tones prized by elite collectors.

name: Tabriz Hadji Jalili Revival

seo.title: Tabriz Hadji Jalili Revival 9x12 Rug | Noor Oriental Rugs
seo.description: Elegant 9x12 Tabriz rug in the classic Hadji Jalili court style, featuring soft caramel, ivory, and rust tones.

description: Inspired by the famed 19th-century master weaver Hadji Jalili, this beautiful semi-antique Tabriz eschews bold reds in favor of an exceptionally elegant, understated palette of soft caramel, antique ivory, terracotta, and warm olive. Perfect for sophisticated, neutral-toned interior design projects.

name: Heriz Tribal Runner

seo.title: Heriz Tribal Runner 3x12 | Vintage Hallway Rugs Boston
seo.description: Incredibly durable 3x12 Heriz tribal runner rug with rich geometric motifs. Excellent condition, perfect for grand hallways.

description: A magnificent, heavy-duty hallway runner woven in the rugged Heriz region. Featuring a repeating chain of vibrant geometric medallions against a deep indigo and brick-red background, this piece is custom-tailored to bring color, warmth, and indestructible charm to long corridors and gallery entryways.
